programs.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programs.desc: A newlywed bride disappears during a freezing Canadian winter leaving police with few clues; the search for her uncovers an unconventional marriage leading to multiple suspects.

programs.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programs.desc: Two young newlyweds move in with the groom's mom to build for their future, but when they mysteriously disappear, investigators embark on a cross-country manhunt for a cold-blooded con man and killer.

programs.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programs.desc: Eight days before the wedding of their dreams, a couple's plans are derailed by a brutal murder; a detailed investigation unravels a murder-for-hire plot that leads them to suspect a member of the wedding party.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: Dennis Murphy reported on the twists and turns of the Jennifer Dulos case.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: A college student is found murdered and the case sits cold for nearly 40 years; Josh Mankiewicz reflects on the vow that keeps the case alive and the innovative method used to catch the killer.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: An aspiring Playboy model is murdered in Miami; a seven-second clip of her last moments alive are caught on security video and could hold key clues; the haunting images make this case one of Dennis Murphy's most memorable.
